name: Chocolate Zucchini Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter, oil, sugar, vanilla, sour milk, and eggs.
2. Add flour, baking soda, cinnamon, cloves, and cocoa; mix well.
3. Fold in shredded zucchini.
4. Pour the batter into 2 greased and floured loaf pans.
5. Sprinkle chocolate chips on top of each loaf before baking.
6. Bake at 325 degrees for 1 hour.
Yield: 2 loaves.
